# Changelog

> Entries older than 60 days are pruned during dream consolidation.

| Date | Author | Change |
|------|--------|--------|
| 2026-04-29 | dev | **MCP architect-level code quality refactoring.** Enforced one-class-per-file across entire MCP layer: split `ProjectCreationDraft.cs` (8 files â†’ `Drafts/`), `ImportedProjectDefinition.cs` (5 files â†’ `Imports/Models/`), `ProjectSetupOrchestrator.cs` (3 nested classes â†’ `Tools/`), `ImportPreviewAnalysisResult.cs` (5 files â†’ `Imports/Common/`), `ApplyImportPreviewResult.cs` (2 files â†’ `Imports/Common/`), `ImportResourceCreationDispatcher.cs` nested class (1 file). Created `McpJsonDefaults` shared static class (`Common/McpJsonDefaults.cs`) eliminating 7 duplicate `JsonSerializerOptions` fields. Created `IacSourceFormat` constant class replacing `"arm-json"` magic string. Created typed records `TopologyInfo` and `ResourceTypeInfo` replacing anonymous `object[]` in `DiscoveryTools`. Migrated `LayoutPreset` from `string?` to `LayoutPresetEnum` domain enum throughout drafts (`DraftProjectIntent`, `DraftOverrides`, `ProjectDraftService`). Removed dead `SetupResult` class. Removed `ValidLayoutPresets` HashSet (enum is self-validating). All topology IDs now use `nameof(LayoutPresetEnum.X)`. Updated 4 test files for new types. 29 new files, 0 errors, 104 MCP tests + 940 total passing. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **Import apply shared across API and MCP.** Added `ApplyImportPreviewCommand` + handler under `src/Api/InfraFlowSculptor.Application/Imports/`, plus shared result/dispatch helpers for project + infra + resource creation. New stateless API endpoint `POST /imports/apply` accepts project setup data and a nested preview payload, then applies the import to a new project. MCP still owns `previewId` storage, but `apply_import_preview` now resolves the cached preview and delegates to the shared Application command. Created dedicated `tests/InfraFlowSculptor.Application.Tests/` with RED/GREEN coverage for the apply handler, added import request validation tests in `Contracts.Tests`, updated MCP adapter tests, and verified targeted builds plus full solution tests. |
| 2026-04-29 | dev | **Import preview extracted out of MCP host.** ARM preview analysis now lives in `src/Api/InfraFlowSculptor.Application/Imports/` (`IImportPreviewAnalyzer`, `ImportPreviewAnalyzer`, `PreviewIacImportQuery`). New read-only API endpoint `POST /imports/preview` returns mapped resources, gaps, dependencies, metadata, and summary for `arm-json` content. MCP keeps preview ID generation and in-memory preview storage, but `ImportPreviewService` now wraps the shared analyzer instead of owning parser logic. This earlier slice also captured the remaining preview-side debt: dedicated Application coverage for the preview analyzer/query still remained to be added. |
| 2026-04-29 | dev | **DS Date Picker component.** New `app-ds-date-picker` in `shared/components/ds/ds-date-picker/` â€” custom calendar dropdown with CDK overlay, brand gradient header, 42-day grid, min/max constraints, locale-aware display (Intl.DateTimeFormat), CVA support, and fast year selection via a 12-year grid with range navigation. Replaced `app-ds-text-field type="date"` in PAT creation dialog. Added i18n key `SETTINGS.CREATE_DIALOG.EXPIRY_PLACEHOLDER` (fr/en). Added a focused component spec and test SCSS include path in `angular.json` so DS component specs resolve `scss/main`. |
| 2026-04-29 | dev | **Settings/PAT screen refactored to DS.** Nav settings link icon fixed (added `.nav-link__icon` style + `display:inline-flex` on `.nav-link`). PAT table refactored: custom `.pat-table__status` badges replaced by `app-ds-chip` (success/error/warning). Table styling extracted to shared `@mixin ifs-data-table` in `scss/_tables.scss`. Create PAT dialog: raw `<input type="date">` replaced by `app-ds-text-field type="date"` (added `date` type + `min` input to DS text-field). Layout aligned with projects page pattern (`width: min(1100px,...)`). Added DS integration rule to `copilot-instructions.md` (pitfall #12) and `angular-patterns/SKILL.md`. |
| 2026-04-29 | dev | **MCP resource creation wired end-to-end.** `create_project_from_draft` and `apply_import_preview` now create actual Azure resources (not just project shell). New `ResourceCommandFactory` (maps 18 resource types to MediatR commands with dependency ordering) and `ProjectSetupOrchestrator` (creates infra config + resource group + resources). Fixed `CreateContainerAppCommand` missing `ContainerRegistryId` param. Aligned output formats with plan contracts (`apply_import_preview` returns `status: "applied"` + `previewId`, `create_project_from_draft` returns `layoutPreset`/`environmentCount`/`repositoryCount`). Added golden ARM template tests (3 templates: simple, dependency, mixed). Added `ProjectSetupOrchestratorTests` (8 tests) + `ResourceCommandFactoryTests`. 105 MCP tests, 1023 total solution tests passing. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **PAT authentication end-to-end.** New `PersonalAccessToken` aggregate (Domain layer) with `ifs_` prefix + SHA-256 hash storage. CQRS commands (Create, Revoke) + ListQuery in Application layer. Contracts DTOs. EF Core config + repository + migration `AddPersonalAccessTokens`. Custom `PersonalAccessTokenAuthenticationHandler` scheme. MCP HTTP endpoint secured with PAT auth (`AddPatAuthentication()`). `.vscode/mcp.json` updated with `Authorization: Bearer ${input:ifs_pat}` header. Frontend: new `/settings` page with PAT management (create dialog with one-time token display + clipboard copy, token list with status badges, revoke flow), new `PersonalAccessTokenService`, i18n (EN/FR), nav link added. All 970 tests passing. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **MCP migrated to HTTP under Aspire.** `src/Mcp/InfraFlowSculptor.Mcp` was converted from a console `stdio` host to an ASP.NET Core MCP HTTP host (`/mcp`, port `5258`) using `ModelContextProtocol.AspNetCore`. `src/Aspire/InfraFlowSculptor.AppHost` now starts `infraflowsculptor-mcp` with Postgres/blob/keyvault dependencies, `.vscode/mcp.json` now points to `http://127.0.0.1:5258/mcp`, and shared infrastructure observability was extended with MCP telemetry sources/meters. Runtime validation passed: `/health` 200, `/alive` 200, MCP `initialize` 200. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **MCP V1 implementation COMPLETE (5 phases).** New `src/Mcp/InfraFlowSculptor.Mcp` console app (stdio transport, ModelContextProtocol SDK v1.2.0). 8 MCP tools: `list_repository_topologies`, `list_supported_resource_types`, `draft_project_from_prompt`, `validate_project_draft`, `create_project_from_draft`, `generate_project_bicep`, `preview_iac_import`, `apply_import_preview`. 2 MCP resources (`ifs://projects/{projectId}/summary`, `ifs://imports/{previewId}`). 1 MCP prompt (`project_creation_guide`). Canonical ARM JSON import pipeline with `ImportPreviewService`. `ConcurrentDictionary`-backed draft and preview stores. `.vscode/mcp.json` configured for local stdio. 52 new tests in `tests/InfraFlowSculptor.Mcp.Tests/`. 970 total tests passing. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **MCP V1 implementation plan:** created `docs/architecture/mcp-v1-implementation-plan.md` with 5 phases (scaffolding, discovery, conversational creation, Bicep generation, ARM import), exhaustive JSON contracts for 8 tools (`list_repository_topologies`, `list_supported_resource_types`, `draft_project_from_prompt`, `validate_project_draft`, `create_project_from_draft`, `generate_project_bicep`, `preview_iac_import`, `apply_import_preview`), 2 MCP resources, 1 MCP prompt, canonical import model C# records, test strategy, and validation checklist. Linked from `docs/README.md`, `docs/architecture/overview.md`, `docs/architecture/mcp-integration.md`, and `.github/memory/02-project-structure.md`. |, a beginner-friendly course explaining what MCP is, how it integrates into a .NET project, how local `stdio` and deployed `http` exposure differ, how it should fit InfraFlowSculptor, and how to critically review the future generated MCP implementation. Linked it from `docs/README.md`, `docs/architecture/overview.md`, and `.github/memory/02-project-structure.md`. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **MCP skill expanded:** added a first recommended MCP tool inventory for InfraFlowSculptor and documented remote VS Code `mcp.json` connection to deployed HTTP endpoints, including tokenized `headers`, local+remote dual-mode examples, and deployment guidance for `/mcp` on the API side. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **MCP skill refined:** added conversational project-creation guidance to `mcp-dotnet-server`, including `draft_project_from_prompt`, mandatory clarification when repo topology is missing, prompt/elicitation strategy, and explicit prohibition on guessing `MonoRepo` vs split infra/code in mutating tools. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **MCP skill added:** new `.github/skills/mcp-dotnet-server/SKILL.md` capturing official MCP/.NET server guidance, VS Code `.vscode/mcp.json` exposure, transport/auth choices, IaC import and diagram-to-project strategy, long-term InfraFlowSculptor integration rules, testing guidance, and pitfalls. Registered in `.github/copilot-instructions.md`, `.github/agents/dev.agent.md`, and `.github/memory/11-agents-skills.md`. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **Sonar duplicate code reduction:** Excluded EF Core migrations from CPD (sonar-project.properties). Deleted dead root-level NamingTemplateTranslator (added missing envShort to Helpers copy). Extracted 6 shared helpers: BlobDownloadHelper (3 Download + 4 Push handlers), TagValidationRules, NamingTemplateValidationRules, RepositoryConnectionValidationRules, GenerationRequestBuilder (~350 lines from GenerateBicep handlers), ConfigPipelineBuilder (CI/PR stages). Frontend: BaseGeneratorService (Bicep/Pipeline services), DsBooleanControlBase (checkbox/toggle CVA). 918 tests pass. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **Sonar hardening follow-up:** project combined ZIP downloads now enforce CRC + size/count/path guards with localized errors, and frontend Roboto/Material Icons stylesheets moved from Google Fonts links to local npm packages bundled by Angular. |
| 2026-04-28 | dev | **Sonar quick wins:** backend regex timeouts bounded (250 ms) with new Contracts/Domain test projects, frontend local regex/bypass/archive-path hotspots hardened, Copilot setup actions pinned to full SHAs, and frontend Docker image tightened (explicit COPY, ignore-scripts, unprivileged nginx). |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Pipeline refactor Vague 1 COMPLETE (1.0-1.3).** 3 engines decomposed into staged facades. Net -335 LOC dead code. 91/91 tests green (44 golden + 47 stage). Golden parity sentinels for 4 engines (83 golden files). Domain decoupled from PipelineGeneration. Plan at `docs/architecture/pipeline-refactoring/00-PLAN.md`. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Bicep V2 migration COMPLETE.** All 18 generators migrated legacy const string to Builder+IR (BicepModuleSpec). Phase 0 IR infra + Phases 1-5 generators by tier + Phase 6 legacy cleanup. IrOutputPruningStage + OutputUsageTracker replaced regex-based pruner. 842 tests total. |
| 2026-04-27 | dev | **Tooling wave:** bicep-v2-migration skill + migration tracker. tdd-workflow skill (RED-GREEN-REFACTOR-VERIFY mandatory). review-expert + review-remediator agents + review-main prompt. POST /projects/with-setup route restored. Pipeline pool emitted in wrappers. KV app settings ViaBicepparam classified as secrets. Config-detail Generate/Push gated to true MultiRepo. |

| 2026-04-25 | dev | **Bicep module uniformity:** Generic userAssignedIdentityId param (AVM-style). Same-typed resources sharing modules. Project-level Git push re-sliced by root folder. Dream exclusive lock. Auth-expiry UX hardened. Local DB snapshot refreshed. |
